error_signature: NodeOperationError: JSON parameter needs to be valid JSON
title: Invalid JSON parameter in HTTP Request node
symptom: The HTTP Request node throws an error stating 'JSON parameter needs to be valid JSON' when executing the workflow.
not_this_if: All input items contain valid data
root_cause: The error occurs when the HTTP Request node processes multiple items, and at least one of the items lacks the required data for the JSON structure, leading to invalid JSON being sent.
fix_steps: Check the output of the preceding node for all items
Ensure that all items contain the necessary data for the HTTP request
Remove or filter out any unnecessary items before the HTTP request
agent_instruction: Verify that all items passed to the HTTP Request node contain valid data for the JSON structure.
